name: Sliced Almond Cookie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 300°F. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
Stir together the egg white and sugar (I don't even use a mixer) and then stir in the almonds.
Drop by teaspoon (they shouldn't be more than 2 inches in diameter) onto the prepared sheet.
Top each ball with chocolate bits.
Bake for about 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
When removed from the oven, gently press down on the chocolate bits to create a smooth surface.
Allow the cookies to cool completely before removing them from the sheet.
